questions.question: Implement a Pig Latin script to count the number of occurrences of each word in a given text. Consider words with different lengths and handle punctuation marks. Provide the count in JSON format.
questions.hint: Use Pig Latin conversion and regex patterns to extract words

questions.question: Develop a Pig Latin script to sort a list of words in ascending order. Consider lexicographical order and handle words with different lengths. Provide the sorted list in JSON format.
questions.hint: Use Pig Latin conversion and compare words using regex patterns

questions.question: Implement a Pig Latin script to limit the number of words to process to 10. Use this limitation to skip processing of words beyond the 10th word. Provide the limited list in JSON format.
questions.hint: Use indexing to track the word count and skip processing of words beyond the 10th word
